pageDescription: Calculate your body fat percentage using the U.S. Army method with our comprehensive Army body fat calculator

bodyFatFormula.label: Army Body Fat Formula
bodyFatFormula.women: Women: %Body Fat = (163.205 × log10(waist + hip - neck)) - (97.684 × log10(height)) - 78.387

results.armyStandards: Army Body Fat Standards: Men 17-20 years (20%), Men 21-27 years (22%), Men 28-39 years (24%), Men 40+ years (26%), Women 17-20 years (30%), Women 21-27 years (32%), Women 28-39 years (34%), Women 40+ years (36%)

tapeTest.title: Army Tape Test
tapeTest.description: Uses circumference measurements to estimate body fat percentage according to AR 600-9

standards.title: Army Standards
standards.description: Based on U.S. Army Regulation 600-9 body fat standards

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides estimates only and is not a diagnostic tool
criticalWarningsList.measurementAccuracy: Accurate measurements are critical for proper results

importantNotesList: Measurements should be taken according to Army specifications
Body fat percentage is just one measure of fitness
Consult healthcare professionals for accurate body composition analysis
Regular exercise and balanced nutrition are important for healthy body composition

messages.enterMeasurements: Enter your measurements to calculate your Army body fat percentage
messages.bodyFatResult: Your estimated body fat percentage is {percentage}%
messages.compliance: You are {status} with Army body fat standards
messages.measurementInstructions: Measurements should be taken according to Army specifications

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides estimates based on mathematical formulas and should not be used as a substitute for official Army body fat assessment. Individual results may vary based on factors not accounted for in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Consult a Healthcare Professional
seekHelp.content: For accurate body composition analysis and personalized health advice, please consult with a healthcare professional or certified fitness trainer who can provide guidance based on your complete health history and individual circumstances.

errors.heightCm: Please enter valid height in cm
errors.neck: Please enter a valid neck measurement
errors.abdomen: Please enter a valid abdomen measurement
errors.waist: Please enter a valid waist measurement
errors.hip: Please enter a valid hip measurement

tooltips.age: Age affects Army body fat standards
tooltips.hip: Measure at the widest point (women only)

calculate_fat_percentage_using_the_us_ar:
Calculate fat percentage using the U.S. Army's June 2025-26 one-site tape test formula and compare
                against AR 600-9 standards.
enter_your_measurements_for_army_body_fa: Enter your measurements for Army body fat assessment
enter_your_measurements_to_calculate_arm: Enter your measurements to calculate Army body fat percentage.
soldiers_may_be_exempt_from_body_fat_ass: Soldiers may be exempt from body fat assessment if they achieve:
tape_snug_but_not_compressing_skin_54: Tape snug but not compressing skin
